domain: Korean maedeup knotted norigae tassel (Korean traditional decorative knot system; 30+ basic knot types — dorae, maehwa, butterfly, dragonfly; 3D symmetric knots with cycle-return invariant; norigae 3-fold structure mainbody-knot-tassel; royal/religious/fashion categorical use; UNESCO intangible heritage Maedeupjang)
specific_mechanism: MAEDEUP-INVARIANT: topological-invariant defect detection for attention patterns with canonical knot catalog. (1) Treat per-head attention pattern as knotted curve in attention-graph space. (2) Compute crossing-number-based topological invariant J(pattern) (e.g., Jones polynomial surrogate or signed-crossing count) per attention head. (3) Maintain canonical 30-knot template catalog C = {dorae, maehwa, butterfly, ...}; expected invariant ranges J_c per template. (4) Defect detection: if J(pattern) deviates from any C template by > δ, flag as knot-pattern defect. (5) Repair: re-route attention weights via learned projection P_repair that pushes pattern toward nearest canonical knot type. (6) Catalog learned via clustering attention patterns of healthy model.
llm_application: MAEDEUP-INVARIANT topological-invariant defect detection for attention with canonical 30-knot catalog + deviation repair. Differs from Geometric Learning Knot Topology 2305.11722 (geometric local-writhe NN for knot classification — different — molecular curves not attention patterns). Learning Topological Invariance 2504.12390 (NN learning invariants — different — generic learning not attention-defect detection). Knotted Molecular Transformer 2501.12780 (Transformer + cross-attention for knot classification — closest, but molecular knots not attention pattern; not defect detection). NN Knot Invariants 1610.05744 (NN predicting invariants — different — knot prediction not attention defect repair). Differs from R425 NDEBELE-TRIANGLE (boundary-defect locus), R436 HUTSUL-PYSANKA (4-fold rotational equivariance), R451 NGATU-DEFECT (RoPE-phase cohomology cocycle local defect — closest, but RoPE-phase not crossing-number knot invariant), R103 KNOT-CoT (CoT trajectory topology) by EXPLICIT KNOT-CROSSING TOPOLOGICAL INVARIANT J + 30-KNOT CANONICAL TEMPLATE + DEVIATION DEFECT DETECTION + REPAIR PROJECTION.
novelty_claim: Geometric Knot Learning + Learning Topological Invariance + Knotted Molecular Transformer + NN Knot Invariants cover knot-topology + invariant-learning + Transformer integration. MAEDEUP-INVARIANT adds (a) crossing-number topological invariant J applied to attention pattern + (b) canonical 30-knot template catalog + (c) deviation defect detection + (d) repair projection. Recombination — knot invariants + attention combined is mainstream lookup.
content_words: norigae canonical-knot template deviation defect detection

llm_side: norigae canonical-knot template deviation defect detection
